fields.requirement: "Consolidated SOCIE" table for SoCIE Actuals ( 7 entity view)
fields.filter_logic: Ingestion into Staging layer: bring through all rows and columns Between Staging and Pre-processing layer: Scenario: Technical name: /ERP/CATEGORY Filtering Criteria: ACT_GRP_F Currency Identifier: Technical name: ZCURIDEN Filtering Criteria: RFX Reported view: Technical name: ZLEDGER Filtering Criteria: 0L (Financial view) RTC Acct Identifier: Technical name: ZACCIDEN Filtering Criteria: FIN Restatement Technical name: ZCUSTOM7 Filtering Criteria: Original Transactional currency: Technical name: /ERP/RTCCURR Filtering Criteria: USD
fields.data_cut_required_by_business: Data that falls into the prior month e.g. FinPeriod = prior month
fields.data_availability_required_by_business: Start of business SGT on day of feed
fields.refresh_frequency: Quarterly Feed: In Apr, Jul, Oct, Jan at 23:59 on Business Days 10, 13, 18, and 20. If feed month has > 20 business days, then an additional feed will be run on the last business day of the feed month. Each feed will overwrite any previous data for the period if it exists e.g. Day 13 feed will overwrite Day 10 feed Monthly Feed (actually required for All In One Query): Monthly on the first business day of each month
fields.data_retention: Current year and prior year required in pre-processing layer
fields.data_owner_data_sme_agreement_received: Yes - GFR’s approval to access the BPC legal views received
fields.arf_approval_received: BPC data already used - approval not required
fields.ftc_approval_received: BPC data already used - approval not required
fields.adf_approval_received: BPC data already used - approval not required
fields.notes: The policy is to onboard all fields from the underlying tables. Only the following fields actually required though: 0FISCYEAR , 0FISCPER, AUDIT, ENTITY, FLOW, GL_ACCT, RGROUP, ZVIEW, ZCUSTOM6, RTC_AMO
